name: Almond Rainbow Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease three 13x9x2 inch pans and line with waxed paper, then grease again.
2. Beat almond paste, butter, sugar, egg yolks, and almond extract in a large bowl for 5 minutes.
3. Add flour and salt; mix until combined.
4. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold egg whites into the almond mixture alternately with dry ingredients.
6. Remove 1 1/2 cups of batter and pour into prepared pan. Smooth surface.
7. Remove another 1 1/2 cups of batter and add green food coloring. Pour over the first layer in the pan.
8. Remove remaining batter, add red food coloring, and pour over the green layer.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes or until set.
10. Remove cakes from pans and cool completely on wire racks.
11. Place one cake layer on a serving plate.
12. Spread apricot jam evenly over the green layer.
13. Place second cake layer on top, spreading with remaining jam.
14. Add third cake layer and spread with remaining red jam.
15. Cover with plastic wrap, pressing down to seal.
16. Refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
17. Melt chocolate and let cool completely.
18. Cut cooled cake into 1-inch square pieces.
